name: Rio
description: Rio is a boy living in the slums who wants revenge for his mother who was murdered in front of him when he was five years old. He has inherited the memories of his last life as Haruto Amakawa, a college student who died in an unfortunate bus accident in Japan.

name: Cherry
description: Cherry often gets nervous and blushes, therefore making it almost impossible for him to speak to others. He's often seen wearing headphones, so that people won't talk to him; this is also to tune-out the sound around him, as he dislikes loud sounds, finding it difficult to cope with them. He expresses himself through Haiku, as talking to other people is hard for him.

description: Ginrou is [Kinrou](https://anilist.co/character/143271/Kinrou)'s younger brother and one of the village guards. name: Ling Lin
description: __Height:__ 180cm Former employee at an advertising agency in charge of producing commercials for [Nice](https://anilist.co/character/362412) and [Moon](https://anilist.co/character/361972). After being fired from his job, he witnesses Nice's apparent suicide and is found at the scene by [Juan](https://anilist.co/character/361976). She and her men take Ling Lin and begin the process of turning him into the hero Nice.

name: Rajdhani
description: Fascinated by This World around him, Rajdhani investigates how and why the students went adrift in a logical and calculating manner. He can get along with most people and he briefs everyone on his findings openly. Rajdhani is rational, scientific and decisive in nature. Rajdhani has the power of "Pocket Computer" by which he can design a program which then comes to life. With this ability he creates many useful "gadgets and tools" which aid in uncovering the truth within This World.

name: Ririsa Amano
description: Ririsa is a beautiful first-year student who joins the manga club. Due to her passion for cosplay, she recruits Okumura to be her photographer. Like Okumura, she is also a fan of Liliel. She was first inspired to become a cosplayer when she visited a cosplay event. Though initially oblivious, she starts to slowly fall in love with Okumura later on.

name: Snufkin
description: Snufkin (or Snusmumriken in the original Swedish and Nuuskamuikkunen in Finnish) is a character in the Moomin series of books by Finnish author Tove Jansson. Moomintroll's best friend, who goes south every winter and returns in the spring. He is the son of the Mymble and the Joxter, and is half-brother to the Mymble's daughter and Little My. Snufkin is an adventurer and a vagabond, admired by those who are small and shy. Snufkin wears old green clothes and a wide brimmed hat he's had since birth
